recommendations.title: Shaolin Soccer
recommendations.overview: A young Shaolin follower reunites with his discouraged brothers to form a soccer team using their martial art skills to their advantage.

recommendations.title: CJ7
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Drama, Family, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: A poor construction worker, who struggles to keep his son in private school, mistakes an orb he finds in a junkjard for a toy which proves to be much, much more once the young boy starts to play with it.

recommendations.title: The Mermaid
recommendations.overview: When Xuan's real estate project threatens the home of mermaids, Shan is sent to stop him. When they fall in love, he is encouraged to cancel the project. However, he must save them from bigger danger.

recommendations.title: The God of Cookery
recommendations.overview: The most renowned and feared chef in the world loses his title of God of Cookery because of his pompous attitude. Humbled, he sets out to reclaim his title.

recommendations.title: Journey to the West: Conquering the Demons
recommendations.overview: In a world plagued by demons who cause great human suffering, young demon hunter Tang Sanzang must fight against monstrous demons, as well as contend with a beautiful demon hunting woman on his path to enlightenment.

recommendations.title: Justice, My Foot!
recommendations.overview: An unscrupulous lawyer with an equally eccentric kung-fu sidekick wife tries to bring justice to the court.

recommendations.title: From Beijing with Love
recommendations.overview: A Chinese secret agent travels to Hong Kong to reclaim a dinosaur fossil but experiences hilarious incidents because of his incompetence.

recommendations.title: Kung Fury
recommendations.overview: During an unfortunate series of events, a friend of Kung Fury is assassinated by the most dangerous kung fu master criminal of all time, Adolf Hitler, a.k.a Kung Führer.  Kung Fury decides to travel back in time to Nazi Germany in order to kill Hitle

recommendations.title: King of Comedy
recommendations.overview: Wan Tin-Sau is an actor who cannot seem to catch a break, since his only professional jobs are limited to being a movie extra. As well as being an actor, he is also the head of his village's community center.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Time in Shanghai
recommendations.overview: A laborer moves to Shanghai in the hope of becoming rich. But ends up using his kung fu skills to survive. Remake of The Boxer From Shantung.
